---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the QMD.md format or the QMDC toolchain
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches the QMD.md format, show example `.qmd.md`
syntax and the expected parsed result.

## Affected component

- [ ] QMD.md format / spec
- [ ] `qmdc` CLI / parser
- [ ] `qmdc-semantic`
- [ ] `qmdc-mkdocs`
- [ ] `qmdc-vscode`

## Parity impact

Format or parser changes must land in all three implementations (Python, Rust,
TypeScript) and stay at conformance parity. Note any implementation-specific
considerations here.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why you prefer this one.
